description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop with daily OHLCV data for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT (January 2023 - December 2024). As a swing trader, create and save a reusable chart template named 'SwingTrading' based on an AAPL daily chart. The template must include a 9-period EMA, a 21-period EMA, a 14-period RSI in a separate panel, and a MACD (12, 26, 9) in a separate panel. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
